source.sourcePath: raw/sources/RA/05_해외 등록 서류 (영업팀 F-up)/260520 우크라이나(Licarno) 23G, P1 - 이창민 팀장님/260527 1차 제출본/3.1 [Portable X-ray System] Technical Document/6. Product Verification and Validation/1. Test report/Test lab ISO 17025 Certificate/[ICR_Co.,_Ltd.] ISO 17025 Certificate.pdf

document.documentType: testing laboratory accreditation scope / certificate excerpt
standards: Ministry of trade, industry and energy notification 2024-169(2024.10.29)
Ministry of employment and labor notification 2024-21(2024.04.17)

sourceSummary.oneLine: Excerpted accreditation scope No. KT652 lists electrical, EMC, medical device, energy efficiency, and environmental/reliability test capabilities with standards, ranges, sites, and field-testing status.
sourceSummary.officialUse: Use as evidence of the test laboratory scope and applicable test standards/ranges, not as product-specific verification for a named model.
keyPoints: Electrical testing scope includes electrical materials/components, measuring instruments, industrial machinery, household machinery, wired/wireless communication devices, medical devices, EMC, energy efficiency, and environmental/reliability sections.
Medical device scope includes multiple IEC/EN 60601 and IEC/EN 80601 standards, including diagnostic X-ray and radiography/radioscopy equipment standards.
EMC scope includes CISPR, EN/IEC 61000, EN/IEC 60601-1-2, ETSI EN 301 489, ISO automotive EMC, railway EMC, ship EMC, and military EMC standards.
Environmental and reliability scope includes IEC 60068, IEC 60529, IEC 61373, ISO 16750, ISO 20653, MIL-STD-810, and related rail/ship/automotive test methods.

entities.name: Ministry of trade, industry and energy notification 2024-169
entities.evidence: Ministry of trade, industry and energy notification 2024-169(2024.10.29)

entities.name: Ministry of employment and labor notification 2024-21
entities.evidence: Ministry of employment and labor notification 2024-21(2024.04.17)

concepts.name: ISO 17025 testing laboratory scope
concepts.evidence: Test method Materials Products Standard designation Test range Site Field testing

evidence.claim: The source excerpt is associated with accreditation identifier No. KT652.
The scope includes testing against ECE Regulation No.100 Rev.3 for electric power train REESS test procedures, with stated exceptions.
evidence.evidenceText: ECE Regulation No.100 Rev.3 Electrical materials and components Uniform provisions concerning the approval of vehicles with regard to specific requirements for the electric power train, Annex 9: REESS test procedures [Exception]

evidence.claim: The scope includes IEC 62619:2022 for safety requirements for secondary lithium cells and batteries for industrial applications, with exceptions for internal short-circuit and laser propagation tests.
evidence.evidenceText: IEC 62619:2022 Electrical materials and components Secondary cells and batteries containing alkaline or other non-acid electrolytes – Safety requirements for secondary lithium cells and batteries, for use in industrial applications [Exception] 7.3.2 Internal short-circuit test (cell) Annex B Procedure of propagation test by laser irradiation

evidence.claim: The measuring instruments scope includes EN IEC 61010-2-091:2021+A11:2021 for cabinet X-ray systems.
evidence.evidenceText: EN IEC 61010-2-091:2021+A11:2021 Measuring Instruments Safety requirements for electrical equipment for measurement, control and laboratory use - Part 2-091: Particular requirements for cabinet X-ray systems

evidence.claim: The medical devices scope includes EN 60601-1-3 for radiation protection in diagnostic X-ray equipment.
evidence.evidenceText: EN 60601-1-3:2008+A1:2013 Medical devices Medical electrical equipment - Part 1-3: General requirements for basic safety and essential performance - Collateral Standard: Radiation protection in diagnostic X-ray equipment

evidence.claim: The medical devices scope includes EN 60601-2-54 for X-ray equipment for radiography and radioscopy.
evidence.evidenceText: EN 60601-2-54:2009+A1:2015+A2:2019 Medical devices Medical electrical equipment - Part 2-54: Particular requirements for the basic safety and essential performance of X-ray equipment for radiography and radioscopy

evidence.claim: The EMC scope includes EN 60601-1-2:2015+A1:2021 for electromagnetic disturbances requirements and tests for medical electrical equipment.
evidence.evidenceText: EN 60601-1-2:2015+A1:2021 Medical equipment Medical electrical equipment - Part 1-2: General requirements for basic safety and essential performance – Collateral standard: Electromagnetic disturbances – Requirements and tests

evidence.claim: The EMC scope includes IEC 60601-1-2:2014+AMD1:2020 with conducted emissions, radiated emissions, ESD, radiated immunity, EFT, surge, conducted immunity, magnetic fields, dips, and proximity magnetic fields ranges.
evidence.evidenceText: IEC 60601-1-2:2014+AMD1:2020 Medical equipment Medical electrical equipment - Part 1-2: General requirements for basic safety and essential performance - Collateral standard: Electromagnetic disturbances - Requirements and tests

evidence.claim: MOLIT Notice No.2025-492 is listed for performance and standards enforcement regulations for automobiles and automobile parts, including drive battery safety tests.
evidence.evidenceText: MOLIT Notice No.2025-492 (09.10.2025.) Electrical materials and components Performance and standards enforcement regulations for automobiles and automobile parts [Attachment 1] No. 48 Safety test for drive battery

evidence.claim: Ministry of trade, industry and energy notification 2024-169 is listed for Regulation for Efficient Management Products.
evidence.evidenceText: Ministry of trade, industry and energy notification 2024-169(2024.10.29) Electrical machinery for households Regulation for Efficient Management Products
evidence.pageTarget: Korea Energy Efficiency Management Products Regulation

evidence.claim: Ministry of employment and labor notification 2024-21 is listed for safety certification regulations for machinery and apparatus.
evidence.evidenceText: Ministry of employment and labor notification 2024-21(2024.04.17) Industrial electrical equipment Non-safety machinery and equipment, Safety certification regulations for machinery, apparatus, etc.

evidence.claim: Environmental and reliability scope includes IEC 60529:2013 for degrees of protection provided by enclosures, IP Code.
evidence.evidenceText: IEC 60529:2013 Electrical/Electronic parts Degrees of protection provided by enclosures (IP Code) IP1X to IP6X IPX1 to IPX9

evidence.claim: Environmental and reliability scope includes ISO 20653:2023 for road vehicle degrees of protection of electrical equipment against foreign objects, water, and access.
evidence.evidenceText: ISO 20653:2023 Automotive parts Road vehicle - Degrees of protection (IP code) - Protection of electrical equipment against foreign objects, water and access

reviewFlags.reason: Document title is not present in the provided source text; title field left empty.
Issuing accreditation authority or jurisdiction is not explicitly present in the provided source text.
Document date is not present as a certificate-level date; dates appear only within standards or regulatory notices.
